data.title: Ed Yardeni raises odds of Roaring 2020s to 60%, boosts S&P 500 target to 7,700 by 2026, suggests 13% rally. Bullish scenario sees S&P 500 at 10,000 by end of decade.
data.description: A Wall Street veteran strategist, Ed Yardeni, has increased his optimism for U.S. equities, now raising the likelihood of a productivity-driven boom through the 2020s from 50% to 60%. Predicting a year-end 2026 S&P 500 target of 7,700, Yardeni's forecast implies a 13% increase from the current Vanguard S&P 500 ETF levels. He anticipates a positive year ahead for stock investors. Yardeni Research now gives a 60% chance for a bullish scenario where the S&P 500 could hit 10,000 points by the decade's end. This outlook is supported by stronger-than-expected productivity trends. You can read the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up before key data, American Eagle, Marvell earnings drive gains. Macy's also moves overnight.
data.description: Ahead of significant economic data, futures saw a slight increase. CrowdStrike and American Eagle, as well as Marvell and Macy's, experienced notable movements in overnight earnings. The Dow Jones futures are on the rise, with American Eagle and Marvell leading the way following their earnings reports. Key economic figures are expected to be released soon.

data.title: Dow futures rebound, S&P 500 and Nasdaq gain. $12 billion relief package for farmers announced. Fed likely to cut rates in December. Stock futures up, with major indices higher. Oracle, Broadcom, Adobe, Campbell's earnings awaited. Carvana up 8.81% after S&P 500 inclusion. 10-year Treasury bond yield at 4.16%, two-year bond at 3.58%.(ActionEvent: Stock Market Up, Futures Rise, Major Earnings Awaited)
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose after previous gains, with major benchmark indices projecting higher numbers. President Trump's administration is expected to announce a $12 billion financial aid plan for struggling U.S. farmers. The Federal Reserve decision later this week and earnings reports from companies like Oracle Corp., Broadcom Inc., and Adobe Inc. are awaited by investors. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.16% and the two-year bond stood at 3.58%. FedWatch tool predicts an 87.4% likelihood of interest rate cut in December. Futures changes were seen in Dow Jones (-0.02%), S&P 500 (0.09%), Nasdaq 100 (0.15%), and Russell 2000 (0.32%). ETFs like SPDR S&P 500 Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were up in premarket. Carvana Co. saw an 8.81% increase after being included in the S&P 500 index. Confluent Inc. also saw gains. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones rebounds, major indexes higher in today's session. Palantir, Nvidia up, biotech down. Live coverage.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average, along with other key indexes, closed the Tuesday session on a positive note, with gains seen. The market rebounded, with notable increases in the stocks of Palantir and Nvidia. Conversely, a biotech company experienced a decline in its shares. The detailed coverage of the stock market events can be found in the live update from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow Jones dropped 427 points with Apple, Broadcom, Nvidia, and Shopify as big movers; Credo, MongoDB surge.
data.description: On Monday, Dow Jones Futures saw significant movement from Apple, Broadcom, Nvidia, and Shopify stocks, while Credo and MongoDB experienced a late surge. The Dow Jones industrial average declined by 427 points during the day.

data.title: Dow declines, Moderna drops on FDA memo, Synopsys & Nvidia rise. Gold stock enters market.
data.description: Today, the Dow experienced a decrease in the stock market. Moderna faced a downturn following an FDA report connecting Covid vaccines to fatalities. Meanwhile, a gold stock delivered positive results. The market indexes closed lower. The stock market updates include Synopsys and Nvidia witnessing an increase.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Drop as Trump Announces Fed Chief Pick, leaders optimistic, big stock market week.
data.description: Several prominent figures are displaying positive indications towards purchasing stocks following a significant week in the market. President Trump has confirmed that he has chosen his nominee for Federal Reserve chief. Dow Jones futures have experienced a decline.

data.title: Stocks rise: Dow positive for November with Nvidia sliding. Inflation data delayed. Intel, Nvidia, Tesla, Robinhood in focus.
data.description: Stocks experienced gains on Friday with a focus on companies like Intel, Nvidia, Tesla, and Robinhood. The Dow is positive for November, but Nvidia saw a decline. Delayed inflation data is looming, creating uncertainty in the market. This information was live coverage from the stock market today.

data.title: Stock futures showed improvement post-Thanksgiving; ASML and gold buy signals among 5 leading stocks.
data.description: Following the Thanksgiving holiday, stock market ETFs indicated an upward trend despite halted futures. ASML and gold-related investments signaled buy opportunities. The post-holiday market activity has shown promising signs, with the Dow Jones index suggesting further gains. ASML stands out among the five stocks that are currently exhibiting buy signals, pointing towards potential growth in the market.

data.title: ADP jobs report shows weak hiring, jobless claims rise, boosting expectations for Fed rate cuts.
data.description: The latest information from the ADP jobs report and initial jobless claims continues to reflect weakness in the labor market. This has led to increased expectations for the Federal Reserve to implement rapid interest rate cuts. The ADP jobs report indicated limited hiring, while there was a rise in initial jobless claims. These developments support the anticipation of Fed rate cuts among investors and analysts.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Tvardi Therapeutics investors. Contact James Wilson if significant losses occurred.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Tvardi to reach out to him directly for a consultation on their available options. If you are an investor who has incurred notable losses in Tvardi stock or options and are interested in exploring your legal avenues, Wilson welcomes you to contact him directly for assistance.

data.title: Cell therapy technologies market to reach $7.91 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 12.4% from $4.41 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on December 11, 2025, it was reported by MarketsandMarkets™ that the Cell Therapy Technologies Market is expected to increase from approximately USD 4.41 billion in 2025 to USD 7.91 million by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.4%. The market data includes 500 tables and 45 figures spread across 470 resources.

data.title: Penn National Insurance President & CEO to retire in July 2026, John Foster to take over, Randal Mancini named Senior VP.
data.description: Robert Brandon, President & CEO, is set to retire in July 2026. John Foster, Senior Vice President of Insurance Operations, will succeed him as President & CEO and join the board of directors. Randal Mancini has been appointed as the new Senior Vice President of Insurance Operations. The company made this announcement on Dec. 11, 2025, in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania.

data.title: Franchise consulting firm unveils 4 reasons why franchisees fail, offering solutions to avoid pitfalls.
data.description: In Shohola, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025, The Perfect Franchise, a prominent U.S. franchise consulting firm, unveiled a recent study highlighting the main causes behind the challenges or failures faced by franchisees. The analysis presents four key reasons contributing to such struggles, offering potential franchise owners effective measures to evade these obstacles. This insightful release aims to assist individuals in the franchise industry in navigating common pitfalls, potentially lowering the failure rate amongst franchisees.

data.title: CPSC announces recalls for TREK electric bicycles due to fall or crash hazard. Visit www.cpsc.gov for more details.
data.description: Today, Washington-based CPSC disclosed several recalls in collaboration with select companies. The information includes the recall of TREK electric bicycles because of potential fall or crash risks (26-138). Details on all recalls can be accessed at www.cpsc.gov.

data.title: Metallurgical test results confirmed at Tanbreez refinery JV in Romania, with Professor Tony Tang appointed as independent reviewer.
data.description: Renowned academic Tony Tang has been named as the independent reviewer for metallurgical test work, process design, and related studies. With extensive expertise in the field, Professor Tang will evaluate critical aspects of metallurgical processes, including testing methodologies and design strategies. His role is pivotal in ensuring the accuracy and efficiency of these processes. This appointment comes at a crucial time, with the industry witnessing a surge in demand for rigorous testing and optimization. Professor Tang's vast experience and knowledge will be instrumental in enhancing the quality and reliability of metallurgical processes.

data.title: Fuel retailers, biodiesel producers, and home heating industry back biodiesel blenders' tax credit bill.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia on December 11, 2025, several major organizations have joined forces to advocate for the U.S. travel plaza and truck stop industry. This coalition includes NATSO, which represents these facilities nationwide, as well as SIGMA: America's Leading Fuel Marketers, the National Association of Convenience Stores (NACS), the National Energy & Fuels Institute (NEFI), and Sustainable...

data.title: Global precision cancer treatments market surged by $211 billion due to platform-based approaches; FDA oncology approvals show industry shift.
data.description: GT Biopharma, Inc. announced in Vancouver, BC on December 11, 2025, that November saw a surge in FDA oncology approvals, indicating a trend towards platform-based precision therapies instead of broad-spectrum treatments. This shift highlights the global focus on anticancer advancements.

data.title: REAL Shows Network (RSN) adds Selling 215 - Made in Philly TV series, focused on real estate and lifestyle in Philadelphia.
data.description: On December 10, 2025, in Philadelphia, REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the addition of a new series called Selling 215 - Made in Philly to its lineup. This locally hosted show in Philadelphia, PA aims to showcase real estate and lifestyle stories. RSN, a national TV platform, focuses on highlighting these narratives and increasing their visibility.

data.title: CPSC warns consumers to stop using HiQiLi Wintergreen Essential Oil due to serious risk. Visit www.cpsc.gov for details.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission issued a safety alert advising consumers to discontinue the use of HiQiLi Wintergreen Essential Oil due to potential serious risks. Detailed product safety warnings and recalls are accessible at www.cpsc.gov. Consumers are urged to heed this warning to avoid any potential dangers associated with the product.
